untranslatable_reason: Belt Hold candle pattern is a specific candlestick formation that requires pattern recognition logic not available in the allowed indicator set. The pattern itself (open at/near low, close at/near high, body direction) cannot be directly expressed using only OHLCV and the provided technical indicators. 'Yearly low' positioning also requires absolute low tracking beyond the 20-bar Donchian available.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using lower_wick characteristics and price positioning, but true Belt Hold pattern detection requires dedicated pattern recognition. Exit condition inferred as close above previous high (reversal confirmation). Bear market context approximated using price below 200-day SMA. Position within third of yearly low approximated using price_pos_20 < 0.33 as proxy for lower range positioning.
